page_content:
ENME656 Theory and Modeling of Wall-Bounded Turbulent Flows (3 Credits)

Provides an introduction to turbulence with a specific focus on turbulent flows near solid boundaries in both external and internal flows. The course will cover both incompressible and compressible flows, and

will introduce both theory and modeling approaches. The course

will also include a more applied component where students will use Computational Fluid Dynamics software to analyze some representative flows
